title: Job Opening Category Manager at Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
